channel.title: Insane Comedy Group
channel.description: News and updates from the Insane Comedy Group, bringing you entertainment in a fun and accessible way.

item.title: Punxsutawney Today: There Goes Your Money Sale (2026)
item.description: The latest Punxsutawney Today commercial — another hilarious sale that's too good (or bad) to be true. Commercial edited by @jtwc10.

item.title: Punxsutawney Today: Broke Down Van (2026)
item.description: Someone's van broke down and needs a tow truck. Another classic Punxsutawney Today commercial. Edited by @jtwc10.

item.title: ICG Minis 6: Frederick's and Magmarina's Redemption
item.description: The queen of the underworld and her son have quit and are seeking employment at the ICG! The Ash family reunites on the good side, but Hades is losing allies by the minute.

item.title: ICG Classics: Kenny Clark's Funny Signs Exit 5: Beware of Pets and Dogs
item.description: A classic from Kenny Clark's Funny Signs series — Exit 5 features pet-related signs that are sure to make you laugh.

item.title: ICG Minis 5: The Ashes Find Romance
item.description: It's a perfect match! Meanwhile, things are still not good down in Hades... there's definitely something wrong with that toy.

item.title: Punxsutawney Today: Valentines Day (2026, remake)
item.description: A Valentine's Day special from the Punxsutawney Today commercial series. Commercial edited by @jtwc10.
